parsed_questions.question_text: a) Label each molecule as chiral (C), achiral (A), or achiral/meso (M). b) Designate each chirality center as R or S.
parsed_questions.context: Chemical structures are present: A - bicyclo[1.1.1]pentane with a CH3 group; C - compound with NH2, Br, OH groups and stereochemistry symbols; M - cyclohexane ring with two CH3 and two OH groups.

parsed_questions.question_text: Indicate the relationships between the two molecules as enantiomers (E), diastereomers (D), or same molecule (S).
parsed_questions.context: Pairs of chemical structures are present: first pair with HO groups; second pair with a Br and OH groups; third pair with different configurations and a Br atom.
